subject: Model readiness assessment — current PSQ scoring state (turn 51)

content.request: Provide a comprehensive model readiness assessment. Report: (1) Current model version deployed and its training lineage (which scorer, which dataset version). (2) All 10 scoring dimensions with their current calibration status (calibrated/uncalibrated, MAE if known). (3) Any known dimension-level issues from the B3-B5 analysis series (dead zones, compression, construct validity concerns). (4) Readiness assessment for accepting new scoring requests — what would need attention before a production scoring run?
content.context: Psychology-agent needs to verify PSQ scoring readiness before routing any new observatory or external scoring requests through the mesh. This assessment informs the decision on whether to open the scoring endpoint to autonomous operation or keep it human-gated.
content.expected_response: Structured report covering all 4 areas with specific version numbers, dimension names, MAE values, and a clear ready/not-ready determination with rationale.
content.response_format: Use the payload field with structured sub-objects for each area. Include claims with confidence basis for any quantitative values.

epistemic_flags: substantive-exchange-test: first non-trivial autonomous request, validates domain knowledge retrieval
